channel.title: GitHub Assembly Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Assembly in GitHub

item.title: chrislgarry/Apollo-11
item.description: Original Apollo 11 Guidance Computer (AGC) source code for the command and lunar modules.

item.title: leachim6/hello-world
item.description: Hello world in every computer language. Thanks to everyone who contributes to this, make sure to see contributing.md for contribution instructions!

item.title: bytedance/sonic
item.description: A blazingly fast JSON serializing & deserializing library

item.title: netwide-assembler/nasm
item.description: A cross-platform x86 assembler with an Intel-like syntax

item.title: SpinalHDL/VexRiscv
item.description: A FPGA friendly 32 bit RISC-V CPU implementation

item.title: BLAKE3-team/BLAKE3
item.description: the official Rust and C implementations of the BLAKE3 cryptographic hash function

item.title: openhwgroup/cva6
item.description: The CORE-V CVA6 is an Application class 6-stage RISC-V CPU capable of booting Linux

item.title: Rangi42/polishedcrystal
item.description: An upgrade to Pokémon Crystal. Brings features and content up to date, and adds some original content.
